title: Ultra-Luxury Penthouse — Golf Course Road
description: Sprawling duplex penthouse with panoramic views of the Aravalli Hills. Private terrace, home theatre, and designer interiors.

title: Heritage Villa — Lutyens' Delhi
description: A masterpiece in India's most prestigious address. Colonial architecture with modern luxury. Landscaped gardens on a 1-acre plot.

title: Grade-A Office Tower — Sector 62
description: Full-floor commercial space in a premium IT corridor. LEED certified, 24/7 access, dedicated parking for 50+ vehicles.

title: Beachfront Plot — Zanzibar
description: Pristine beachfront land with development potential. Crystal-clear waters, perfect for a boutique resort or private estate.

title: Luxury Condo — Downtown Vancouver
description: Contemporary waterfront living with floor-to-ceiling glass, mountain views, and world-class amenities in Coal Harbour.

title: Premium Retail Space — Connaught Place
description: Prime retail frontage on the inner circle of Connaught Place. High footfall, brand visibility, and heritage address.

title: Farmhouse Estate — Chattarpur
description: Gated farmhouse estate with swimming pool, landscaped gardens, staff quarters, and private security.

title: Development Plot — Greater Noida
description: Approved residential development land near Jewar Airport corridor. Excellent connectivity and appreciation potential.

title: Penthouse Suite — Melbourne CBD
description: Sky-high luxury in Melbourne's Southbank. Yarra River views, rooftop terrace, and access to five-star hotel amenities.
